feature: Activity History — Recent Workouts & Load Basics

functions.description: Pure deterministic grouping behind the Activity History screen: rolls a newest-first workout list into per-week groups (Monday-start, POSIX calendar) with training-load basics — weekly mileage, run count, and rest days. Drops workouts with unparseable dates.
functions.name: ActivityHistory

functions.description: The Today dashboard's entry point into Activity History: a full-width card button that opens the recent-workouts history overlay.
functions.name: ActivityHistoryButton

functions.description: The day-one empty state for Activity History: a friendly Buddy prompt shown when no workouts have been logged yet.
functions.name: ActivityHistoryEmptyState

functions.description: The Activity History title bar: Buddy avatar, screen name with a recent-workouts subtitle, and a Done button that dismisses back to the dashboard.
functions.name: ActivityHistoryHeader

functions.description: The read-only Activity History screen: composes the header, per-week sections, and empty state over model.today.workouts, branching between the grouped history and the day-one empty prompt.
functions.name: ActivityHistoryView

functions.description: One week in the history: a header row with the week label and its mileage/run/rest rollup, followed by the week's workouts rendered as shared WorkoutCard rows.
functions.name: ActivityWeekSection

functions.description: Observable model for the Today dashboard. Reads the day's TodayState from flat rb-prefixed UserDefaults keys seeded at launch, and exposes derived values: goalProgress clamped to 1.0, stepsRemaining, goalReached, and a connect action that flips the day-one hero into the dashboard.
functions.name: RunBuddyModel

functions.description: The full Today surface composed from the header, Buddy summary, stats row, and the coach, latest-activity, and weekly-load cards. Exercised by the Today dashboard application scenarios.
functions.name: TodayDashboard

userPrompt:
mode: ui

## Goal

A scrollable history of recent workouts with **weekly mileage, run frequency,
and training-load basics** (Milestone 4), so the user can see their progress
beyond just today.

## What exists today

- `LatestWorkout` + `WeeklyLoad` domain types (`Sources/AppCore/Model.swift`).
- `WorkoutCard` (`Sources/AppCore/WorkoutCard.swift`) — single-workout card,
  reusable as a list row.
- Seed-driven scenario model (`rb*` UserDefaults keys) for injecting state.

## What to build

- Extend the model with a `workouts: [LatestWorkout]` history list (source-
  tagged healthkit/strava) plus a derived weekly rollup (mileage, run count,
  rest days).
- An `ActivityHistoryView` listing workouts grouped by week with a header
  rollup; rows reuse `WorkoutCard` styling.
- Reached from the Coach/Today navigation; production starts empty.

## Scenarios (data states)

- **Empty** — no workouts yet → day-one empty state.
- **Sparse** — 1–2 recent workouts.
- **Rich** — multiple weeks, mixed run/walk, enough to exercise grouping.
- **Long values** — very long run + high mileage week (layout/number edge).

## Out of scope

- Strava OAuth/import (Milestone 5), dedup, maps/routes, per-workout detail
  screen, editing workouts.
